query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, bookTotal, modelTotal,
  CAST(bookTotal AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as bk_decimal,
  CAST(modelTotal AS DECIMAL(10,2)) as mdl_decimal
FROM games 
WHERE awayTeam='NYM' AND homeTeam='ARI' AND gameDate='2026-05-09';
